overlap_analysis.reason: No structured pre-selector candidate dataset was supplied; current telemetry stores only selected candidates.

pipeline_architecture.observability: No unified detector-attempt event; candidate CSV starts after selection/scoring path.
Rejects are text logs; no durable structured selector event dataset.
Risk status is embedded in plans/decision snapshots, not a separate event table.
pipeline_architecture.output: RiskVerdict(allowed, status, reasons, risk, leverage, max positions)
TradePlan with verdict EXECUTABLE or BLOCKED

pipeline_architecture.observability: Aggregate log marker; no standalone structured stage event.

detector_gates: only considered when no primary candidate survives
must be explicitly present in ENABLED_STRATEGIES
aligned direction with pressure/expansion and feature evidence
rejects: alignment, execution score or entry quality insufficient

detector_gates: wick through 12-bar pivot and reclaim within tolerance
sweep must be within 6 recent bars
rejects: pivot not swept or reclaim missing
displacement, volume, wick or follow-through insufficient
countertrend context without strong MTF reclaim exception

detector_gates: volatility rank <= 55 strict or <= 65 with MTF bridge
rejects: EMA retest/reclaim missing or too extended
HTF direction absent without MTF bridge

detector_gates: fresh break below 20-bar range low or prearmed setup
failed reclaim <= 35 bps and breakdown age <= 2 bars
rejects: shorts disabled or bearish context absent
no fresh breakdown or failed reclaim
weak participation, volume, close or follow-through

detector_gates: fresh break above 20-bar range high or prearmed setup
pullback <= 45 bps and breakout age <= 3 bars
rejects: trend not aligned without MTF/prearmed override
no fresh breakout or breakout confirmation
weak participation, volume, close or follow-through

detector_gates: aligned trend or MTF pressure bridge
SHORT uses stricter pressure, volume and follow-through gates
